questionText: A projectile has position $x = 30t$, $y = 25t - 5t^2$ (metres) at time $t$ seconds. Find the maximum height and the horizontal distance travelled when it is reached.

steps.explanation: The maximum height is where the vertical velocity is zero.

steps.description: Find the time of maximum height
steps.explanation: Solving gives the time at the peak.
Substituting the time into the height equation.

steps.description: Find the horizontal distance at that time
steps.explanation: Substituting the time into the horizontal-position equation.
The projectile is highest $75$ m downrange, at a height of $31.25$ m.

workedSolution.finalAnswer: Maximum height $31.25$ m, reached at $x = 75$ m.
